meaning: n.[动] (=sand eel)玉筋属鱼(落潮时常钻进海滩沙中)
examples: Launce and Tom's design collaborations and vision brought life to the ID Works line.
Our Flux modular tool system is another creative design by Launce Barber and Tom Stokes as a part of our ID Works tool family.
Launce Barber is dedicated to discovering great design ideas by using the most fundamental tool we all share in common-our creative minds.
